acid_proof.description: Knows how to deal with acid
acid_proof.name: Acid Proof

acid_touch.description: Turns the surrounding biomes into a wasteland
acid_touch.name: Acid Touch

agile.description: Quick, and always one step ahead
agile.flavor: Never misses a chance to show off
agile.name: Agile

ambitious.flavor: The view is better from the throne
ambitious.name: Ambitious

attractive.flavor: Beauty is in the eye... of everyone
attractive.name: Attractive

backstep.description: Ability to step back before being hit in battle
backstep.flavor: Sometimes the best defense is a good... step back
backstep.name: Backstep

battle_reflexes.description: More likely to perform combat actions
battle_reflexes.name: Battle Reflexes

block.flavor: The best conversation is no conversation
block.name: Block

boat.flavor: Smart boat, without dumb boat problems
boat.name: It's a Boat

bomberman.description: Likes to throw bombs at their troubles
bomberman.flavor: When life gives them lemons, they make grenades
bomberman.name: Bomberman

bubble_defense.description: Creates a bubble shield for protection
bubble_defense.name: Bubble Defense

burning_feet.description: Burns the ground where he walks
burning_feet.flavor: Step by step, burn by burn
burning_feet.name: Burning Feet

chosen_one.description: Unmatched power and magic at their command
chosen_one.flavor: Destiny has plans for this one. No pressure, though
chosen_one.name: The Chosen One

clone.description: An artificially created copy of an original being
clone.flavor: A shadow of another being, bound to suffer the same fate
clone.name: Clone

cold_aura.flavor: Cold follows them like a shadow
cold_aura.name: Cold Aura

contagious.description: Increases the chance of plague outbreaks
contagious.name: Contagious

content.description: At peace with their place in the world
content.name: Content

crippled.description: They used to be an adventurer like you
crippled.name: Crippled

dash.description: Can dash toward enemies before attacking
dash.flavor: Why wait for them to come to you?
dash.name: Dash

death_bomb.flavor: A minor explosion, but a major inconvenience
death_bomb.name: Death Bomb

death_mark.flavor: The void calls. The answer is inevitable
death_mark.name: Mark of Death

death_nuke.flavor: They turn death into a weapon
death_nuke.name: Death Nuke

deceitful.description: They weave webs of lies to get what they want
deceitful.flavor: Their smile hides a future betrayal
deceitful.name: Deceitful

deflect_projectile.description: Can deflect projectiles back at the attacker
deflect_projectile.name: Deflect Projectiles

desire_computer.description: Seeks the forbidden machine that knows all
desire_computer.flavor: The allure of ultimate knowledge is impossible to resist
desire_computer.name: Evil Computer Desire

desire_golden_egg.flavor: Worth more than its weight in gold
desire_golden_egg.name: Golden Egg Desire

desire_harp.description: Seeks the mystical instrument of the heavens
desire_harp.name: Ethereal Harp Desire

dodge.description: Knows how to get out of danger
dodge.name: Dodge

dragonslayer.description: The grandchildren will be tired of hearing this story
dragonslayer.flavor: A tale of fire, fury, and a lot of luck
dragonslayer.name: Dragonslayer

energized.description: Has chance to spawn lightning on death
energized.name: Energized

eyepatch.description: The price of bravery or a cruel twist of fate
eyepatch.name: One Eyed

fast.flavor: They never know when to stop
fast.name: Fast

fire_proof.flavor: Plays with fire and always wins
fire_proof.name: Fire Proof

fragile_health.description: More vulnerable to damage and sickness
fragile_health.flavor: Because sometimes life just wants to watch you suffer
fragile_health.name: Fragile Health

freeze_proof.flavor: Winter's just a state of mind
freeze_proof.name: Freeze Proof

gluttonous.description: Consumes more food than most can imagine
gluttonous.flavor: Food mysteriously disappears in their presence
gluttonous.name: Gluttonous

golden_tooth.flavor: A smile worth its weight in gold
golden_tooth.name: Golden Tooth

greedy.description: Nothing is ever enough for those ruled by greed
greedy.name: Greedy

hard_skin.description: Nothing can penetrate this tough exterior
hard_skin.flavor: Except love! And maybe a really sharp knife
hard_skin.name: Hard Skin

healing_aura.description: Restores health and cures plague of creatures around it
healing_aura.flavor: A soothing presence that mends all wounds
healing_aura.name: Healing Aura

heart_of_wizard.description: Possesses abundant mana reserves for spellcasting
heart_of_wizard.name: Heart of Wizard

heliophobia.flavor: A creature of the night, cursed by the day
heliophobia.name: Heliophobia

honest.description: They value honesty above all, even when it hurts
honest.flavor: The truth might hurt, but they won't sugarcoat it
honest.name: Honest

hotheaded.description: Has a short fuse and is prone to starting fights
hotheaded.flavor: Anger is their default response to most situations
hotheaded.name: Hotheaded

immortal.description: Can't die from an old age
immortal.flavor: Eternal life comes with its own burdens
immortal.name: Immortal

immune.description: Completely resistant to diseases and illnesses
immune.name: Immune

kingslayer.description: Killed a king and survived the aftermath... for now
kingslayer.flavor: When you attack a king, you better not miss!
kingslayer.name: Kingslayer

long_liver.flavor: They count every calorie and step toward eternity
long_liver.name: Long Liver

lucky.description: Luck is always by their side
lucky.name: Lucky

madness.flavor: Finds prophecies between the lines of reality
madness.name: Madness

mageslayer.description: Loves the smell of burned magic in the morning
mageslayer.name: Mageslayer

mega_heartbeat.description: Emits a powerful pulse that pushes everyone away
mega_heartbeat.flavor: Too much love can be as destructive as too little
mega_heartbeat.name: Mega Heartbeat

metamorphed.description: Has shifted into a new form
metamorphed.name: Metamorphed

miner.description: Increases chances to get gems from mines
miner.name: Miner

miracle_bearer.flavor: Evidence that life persists against all odds
miracle_bearer.name: Miracle Bearer

miracle_born.description: Appeared like a miracle into this world
miracle_born.name: Miracle Born

moonchild.description: Grants unique bonuses during the Age of the Moon
moonchild.name: Moonchild

mush_spores.description: The MUSH must grow! Carries fungal spores that activate upon the host's death
mush_spores.flavor: The end of one life sparks a new beginning
mush_spores.name: MUSH Spores

mute.description: Unable to speak or use religion spells
mute.name: Mute

nightchild.flavor: The night reveals to them what the day obscures
nightchild.name: Nightchild

pacifist.description: Strongly favors peace and avoids conflict whenever possible
pacifist.flavor: For them, conflict is the result of failure, not the key to success
pacifist.name: Pacifist

paranoid.description: Constantly on edge, they see threats in every corner
paranoid.flavor: Trust no one, not even themselves
paranoid.name: Paranoid

plague.description: Damages over time and spreads to nearby units
plague.name: Plague

poison_immune.description: Completely immune to the effects of poison
poison_immune.name: Poison Immunity

psychopath.description: Their mind is a labyrinth of cold calculations
psychopath.name: Psychopath

pyromaniac.description: Likes to see the world burn
pyromaniac.name: Pyromaniac

regeneration.description: Gradually restores lost health over time
regeneration.flavor: A second chance, one cell at a time
regeneration.name: Regeneration

savage.description: Harvests bones and leather from defeated enemies
savage.name: Savage

scar_of_divinity.flavor: Somebody up there has some plans
scar_of_divinity.name: Scar of Divinity

shiny.description: Emits a radiant shine, attracting attention from others
shiny.name: Shiny

slow.flavor: There's always tomorrow... or the day after
slow.name: Slow

soft_skin.description: Soft and squishy, like a marshmallow
soft_skin.name: Soft Skin

strong.description: Significantly increases physical damage dealt in combat
strong.flavor: Opens all jars on first try
strong.name: Strong

strong_minded.flavor: Their mind is an iron fortress
strong_minded.name: Strong Minded

stupid.flavor: Not the sharpest tool in the shed
stupid.name: Stupid

sunblessed.description: Heals over time when exposed to sunlight
sunblessed.flavor: Like a plant, just with more personality!
sunblessed.name: Sunblessed

super_health.flavor: Granted for the love of crab
super_health.name: Super Health

thief.flavor: One for you... all for me
thief.name: Thief

tiny.description: Small in size, mighty in spirit
tiny.flavor: What is this, a trait for ants?
tiny.name: Tiny

tough.flavor: What doesn't kill them just bounces off
tough.name: Tough

tumor_infection.description: Slowly transforms into a horrible creature
tumor_infection.flavor: Self becomes memory, memory becomes nightmare
tumor_infection.name: Tumor Infection

unlucky.description: Increases the likelihood of negative events for self and nearby units
unlucky.name: Unlucky

venomous.description: Applies poison to enemies upon landing a hit
venomous.flavor: Venom is a gift of death
venomous.name: Venomous

veteran.description: Experienced in battle after surviving numerous fights
veteran.name: Veteran

weak.flavor: Physically frail, but resilient in spirit
weak.name: Weak

weightless.description: Too light to break thin ice
weightless.flavor: Defies gravity with an effortless grace
weightless.name: Weightless

wise.description: Possesses wisdom accumulated over a lifetime
wise.name: Wise

zombie.description: Has an insatiable hunger for brains
zombie.flavor: A mind is a terrible thing to waste
zombie.name: Zombie
